title: taraxacum variegatum
intro: Taraxacum variegatum, also known as the white dandelion or variegated dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus Taraxacum. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its bitter compounds, which have been shown to have hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum variegatum include its potential to support liver function, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Taraxacum variegatum can be prepared as an herbal supplement in various forms, including capsules, teas, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
